purpose: Evaluate AI models: give model the Mnemos context package, then ask tasks. Score against ground_truth keywords.

protocol.step1: Provide model with project.dna.json + agent_context.json only (no raw repo)
protocol.step3: Score response with mnemos-bench/scorer/run.mjs keyword scorer
protocol.step4: Compare model score vs mnemos baseline in this file
